message:
🐛 Wrap unprotected JSON.parse calls in try-catch across frontend (#1952)

Add try-catch to ~20 JSON.parse calls in WebSocket handlers,
drill-down components, and kubectlProxy methods to prevent
unhandled SyntaxError exceptions from crashing the UI.

Fixes #1910

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
